# vike-rss-generator

> A Vite plugin and Vike extension that generates RSS 2.0, Atom 1.0, and JSON Feed 1.1 files from Vike routes at build time.

## Installation

```bash
bun add vike-rss-generator
```

Peers: vike >= 0.4.250, vite >= 7.0.0

## Usage

1. Add `vikeRss()` plugin to vite.config.ts with `baseUrl` and `groups`
2. Extend Vike config with `vike-rss-generator/config` in +config.ts
3. Create `+rss.ts` files next to pages to opt them into feeds

## Exports

- `vike-rss-generator` ‚Äî `vikeRss` plugin factory, `normalizeDate`, `toRfc2822`, `toIso8601`, and all public types
- `vike-rss-generator/config` ‚Äî Vike extension config (used in `extends` only)

## Key Types

- `RssPluginOptions` ‚Äî plugin options: baseUrl, groups, defaultGroup, include/exclude, concurrency, dryRun
- `RssGroupConfig` ‚Äî group definition: id, name, format, channel metadata, sorting, limits
- `RssPageConfig` ‚Äî per-page config: single item or array for multi-group
- `RssPageConfigFn` ‚Äî async function form receiving page context
- `RssItemConfig` ‚Äî item fields: title, description, content, pubDate, author, categories, guid, enclosure, customFields
